top3.sql:
SELECT T.team_long_name
FROM Match M
JOIN Team T ON M.home_team_api_id = T.team_api_id
WHERE M.season = '2016'
GROUP BY T.team_long_name
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN M.home_team_goal < M.away_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = (
    SELECT MIN(losses)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS losses
        FROM Match M2
        WHERE M2.season = '2016' AND M2.home_team_goal < M2.away_team_goal
        GROUP BY M2.home_team_api_id
    )
);

SELECT T.team_long_name
FROM Match M
JOIN Team T ON M.home_team_api_id = T.team_api_id
WHERE M.season = '2016'
GROUP BY T.team_long_name, T.team_api_id
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN M.home_team_goal < M.away_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = (
    SELECT MIN(losses)
    FROM (
        SELECT home_team_api_id, SUM(CASE WHEN home_team_goal < away_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS losses
        FROM Match
        WHERE season = '2016'
        GROUP BY home_team_api_id
    )
);

SELECT T.team_long_name
FROM Match M
JOIN Team T ON M.home_team_api_id = T.team_api_id
WHERE M.season = '2016'
GROUP BY T.team_long_name
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN M.home_team_goal < M.away_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = (
    SELECT MIN(losses)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS losses
        FROM Match M2
        WHERE M2.season = '2016' AND M2.home_team_goal < M2.away_team_goal
        GROUP BY M2.home_team_api_id
    )
);

SELECT T.team_long_name
FROM Match M
JOIN Team T ON M.home_team_api_id = T.team_api_id
WHERE M.season = '2016'
GROUP BY T.team_long_name, T.team_api_id
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN M.home_team_goal < M.away_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = (
    SELECT MIN(losses)
    FROM (
        SELECT home_team_api_id, SUM(CASE WHEN home_team_goal < away_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS losses
        FROM Match
        WHERE season = '2016'
        GROUP BY home_team_api_id
    )
);

SELECT T.team_long_name
FROM Match M
JOIN Team T ON M.home_team_api_id = T.team_api_id
WHERE M.season = '2016'
GROUP BY T.team_long_name, T.team_api_id
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN M.home_team_goal < M.away_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = (
    SELECT MIN(losses)
    FROM (
        SELECT home_team_api_id,
               COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE home_team_goal < away_team_goal) AS losses
        FROM Match
        WHERE season = '2016'
        GROUP BY home_team_api_id
    )
);

    SELECT MIN(losses)
    FROM (

        FROM Match M2
        WHERE M2.season = '2016' AND M2.home_team_goal < M2.away_team_goal
        GROUP BY M2.home_team_api_id
    )
);

FROM Match M
JOIN Team T ON M.home_team_api_id = T.team_api_id

        FROM Match
        WHERE season = '2016'
        GROUP BY home_team_api_id
    )
);

FROM Match M
JOIN Team T ON M.home_team_api_id = T.team_api_id
WHERE M.season = '2016'
GROUP BY T.team_long_name, T.team_api_id

final.sql:
SELECT T.team_long_name
FROM Match M
JOIN Team T ON M.home_team_api_id = T.team_api_id
WHERE M.season = '2016'
GROUP BY T.team_long_name
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN M.home_team_goal < M.away_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = (
    SELECT MIN(losses)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS losses
        FROM Match M2
        WHERE M2.season = '2016' AND M2.home_team_goal < M2.away_team_goal
        GROUP BY M2.home_team_api_id
    )
);
